apihelp-abstractwiki_run_fragment-summar: Render an Abstract Wikipedia content fragment for the given Wikidata Item Id, language Zid and date
apihelp-abstractwiki_run_fragment-param-: Whether to run this call asynchronously or synchronously. If called asynchronously, it will return pending=true if the value is not ready. When called synchronously, it will wait for the fragment to be rendered by Wikifunctions and return the resulting value.
The Wikidata Item Id used to render the fragment. It should be a valid Qid.
The Language ZObject Id used to render the fragment. It should be a valid Zid.
The date string used to render the fragment.
A fragment composition JSON. It should be a valid ZObject and should output an object of type Z89/HTML Fragment
apihelp-abstractwiki_run_fragment-exampl: Run a fragment with a literal HTML object
Run a fragment with a composition that uses qid and language arguments
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-bad-f: The fragment is not a valid function call.
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-bad-r: The fragment returned the wrong type.
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-forbi: You do not have the necessary permissions to render this fragment.
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-not-e: Unable to render Abstract Wikipedia content fragments: this feature is not enabled.
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-servi: The rendering service is temporarily unavailable. Please, try again later.
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-unkno: Unable to render this fragment due to an unknown error.
